entity.label: Harim
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The head of the second course of priests (1 Chr. 24:8).

nodes.label: Harim
nodes.description: The head of the second course of priests (1 Chr. 24:8).

verses.text: The third to Harim, the fourth to Seorim,
The children of Harim, a thousand and seventeen.
And of the sons of Harim; Maaseiah, and Elijah, and Shemaiah, and Jehiel, and Uzziah.
And of the sons of Harim; Eliezer, Ishijah, Malchiah, Shemaiah, Shimeon,
The children of Harim, a thousand and seventeen.
